name: hyperlocal-video
description: Hyperlocal Network merchant sales video — Remotion

scripts.render: npx remotion render HyperlocalVideo out/hyperlocal.mp4 --codec h264 --crf 18
scripts.render:preview: npx remotion render HyperlocalVideo out/hyperlocal-preview.mp4 --codec h264 --crf 28 --scale 0.5
